name: Cherry Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an 8-inch square cake pan by oiling and flouring it.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Drain the water-packed cherries.
4. Measure 1 cup of the drained cherries and set aside.
5. In a blender, puree together 1/2 cup sweet milk and 1/2 cup packed dates.
6. Blend oil, egg yolks, and applesauce. Set aside next to the cherries.
7. In a small bowl, beat 2 egg whites until stiff and set aside.
8. In a large bowl, combine flours, dry milk, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices. Stir well.
9. Gradually mix the blended liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients until well moistened.
10. Gently stir in the cherries.
11. Fold in the egg whites just until combined.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes.
13. Cool the cake to room temperature.
14. Refrigerate, covered.
Yield Variation: Substitute 1 cup fresh sliced strawberries for cherries.
Per serving: 160 calories, 1 bread, 1 fruit, and 1 fat exchange.
